name: www.advancedcoolingtech.us
message: Advanced Cooling Technologies, Inc is a leading provider of medical cooling solutions, specializing in the distribution of Airsys Medical Chillers in the USA. They offer a comprehensive range of services including replacement chiller sales, maintenance contracts, OEM parts, and technical support. With over 20 years of experience, ACT is recognized for delivering quality service and high availability chillers to hospitals, contractors, and industry peers.
